title: Vim! (A Nukacraft mod)
description: A QOL mod for nukacraft. It lets the mod be able to be finished in survival mode.
body:
# Vim! is a Q.O.L. mod for "Nukacraft: Fallout mod"

## MAJOR PROJECT REBUILD AS OF VERSION 1.0.0 (POWER ARMOR SYSTEM REFINEMENTS UPDATE!!!)

### 1. Steel can be used as iron in:
- Anvils
- Blast Furnace
- Chains
- Flint and Steel
- Rail
- Saddle (recipe is backported)
- Shears
- Sheild
- Smithing Table
- Stone Cutter
- Bucket
- Iron Pickaxe
  
### 2. Aluminium can be used as iron in:
- Compass
- Crossbow
- Hopper
- Lantern
- Minecart
- Piston
- Tripwire Hook
  
### 3. Adds craftablity to the following items:
- You can now cook Raw Brahmin Meat
- String (from wool)
- "Dirty" wool (light grey wool from 9x textile)
- "Clean" wool (craft with: 1 Abraxo and 8 light grey)
- Saturnite
- Nether Warts from Blocks
- Empty Aid Items
- Ultracite powder
- Redstone
- Refineable Cobalt and Scarlet flux
- RadX

### 4. Hardened leather can be used as normal leather in:
- Bundle
- Saddle
- Item Frame

### 5. Goo can be used as slime in all vanilla recipies. 

### 6. Adds Power Armour as drops in the overseer's chest
- 25% chance of a Power Armour frame, and up to 6 peices of power armour dropping.

### 7. Adds the pipboy as a drop in the rare vault chests
- 25% chance of dropping

### 8. New Aid Items
- New Stimpacks that drops empty versions when used
- New Rad Away that drops empty versions when used
- Doctor's Bag that can be refilled
- Vim! Drink

### 9. Added Nukacraft loottables to the wasteland
- Crafting Materials: rubber, plastic, adhesive, springs, gears, screws, fiber, textile
- Medical Supplies: stimpaks, RadX, RadAway, antiseptic, IV bags
- Components: weapon parts, magnets, optofiber, nuclear material, steel
- Currency: caps
- Explosives: grenades, mines
- Raw Materials: ceramic, fertilizer, threads
- Electronics: redstone, optofiber (in radiotower cabinets)
- Food: Various wasteland food items (in fridges)

### 10. Power Armor System Refinements!
- Encounter Power Armor Frames with random pieces of Power Armor Pieces still attached to it!
- Power Armor Frame parking feature on Power Armor Stations! (just shift right-click a power armor station with a power armor frame near it, and it will lock the power armor frame into place)
- You may encounter a very specific issue of power aror frames facig you when you relog in the world, this is a very early attempt of fixing power armor frame facing issue, this has been resolved in the latest nukacraft build but I left the feature here, so dont mind it. Also, you may also encounter a power armor station gui empty texture when you accidentaly right click pa station without shift clicking, this is also another one of the attempts to overhaul it, but then i decided to implement it directly to Nukacraft mod itelf, so you are in for a treat!

Project plans:
- Make it work again. Suggestions are greatly appreciated and helps in further improving the mod. DM britishgun or almecio1412 on discord.
